title: XmingPortablePuttySessions.Watcher.StartWatching() failed: 'sessions' does not exist.
author: vivekvemula1
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
I am trying to launch MRemoteNg and it is crashing (closing the application soon after the launch). I am using mRemoteNG-Installer-1.76.20.24615.msi

Error: 

2024-01-17 11:04:02,735 [1] WARN  - XmingPortablePuttySessions.Watcher.StartWatching() failed: 'sessions' does not exist.
2024-01-17 11:04:52,037 [1] INFO  - mRemoteNG 1.76.20.24615 starting.
2024-01-17 11:04:52,040 [1] INFO  - Command Line: C:\Program Files (x86)\m...

iterations.description: Issue body is empty, labels are legacy (1.76.20), no reproduction steps provided, and the existing triage comment already requests retesting on the latest build before further action.
Bulk verified: issue reviewed and triaged

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: look like its not able to access config files for some reason, "Loading External Apps failed: Could not FIND file!" could you try to check if mR have write permissions in that folder?

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Update from fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`**

The `XmingPortablePuttySessions` class has been removed in the current codebase. `PuttySessionsRegistryProvider` now has proper try/catch handling, so this error should no longer occur.

Available in **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed** and included in **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**.

notes: XmingPortablePuttySessions class removed in current codebase. PuttySessionsRegistryProvider has try/catch guard.
